businessQuestion: What is the customer retention trend by cohort?
sqlAnswer:
WITH FIRST_PURCHASE AS (
SELECT
    CUSTOMER_KEY,
    MIN(DATE_KEY) AS FIRST_PURCHASE_DATE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES
GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
    FIRST_PURCHASE_DATE,
    COUNT(DISTINCT FS.CUSTOMER_KEY) AS RETAINED_CUSTOMERS
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN FIRST_PURCHASE FP
ON FS.CUSTOMER_KEY=FP.CUSTOMER_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
businessContext: Customer analytics teams want to measure repeat purchase behavior over time.
